common.helpAccountCreateTitle: アカウントの作成方法
common.helpAccountCreateContent: 有効なメールアドレスまたは電話番号でアカウントを作成し、安全なパスワードを設定します。後で本人確認を完了すると、より多くの機能を利用できます。
common.helpAccountLoginContent: 登録時に使用したメールアドレス、電話番号、パスワードでログインします。パスワードを忘れた場合は、パスワード復旧で再設定してください。
common.helpAccountSecurityTitle: アカウントセキュリティを高める方法
common.helpAccountSecurityContent: 二要素認証を有効にし、パスワードを定期的に更新し、安全でないネットワークでのログインを避けてください。
common.helpAccountKycContent: KYCはユーザー本人を確認し、取引や出金など重要操作のリスク管理を支援する本人確認プロセスです。
common.helpTradingSpotTitle: 現物取引チュートリアル
common.helpTradingSpotContent: 現物取引では、買い手と売り手が現在の市場価格で資産を交換します。
common.helpTradingFuturesTitle: 契約取引チュートリアル
common.helpTradingFuturesContent: 契約取引では、将来の価格変動に基づいて取引できます。リスクを理解したうえで慎重に利用してください。
common.helpTradingOrderContent: 取引ページでペアを選択し、価格と数量を入力し、注文タイプを選んで買いまたは売り注文を送信します。
common.helpTradingFeesContent: 取引手数料はユーザーレベル、商品種別、執行内容によって異なります。最終手数料は約定済み注文記録に表示されます。
common.helpDepositCryptoContent: 資産ページを開き、入金を選択し、通貨を選んで入金アドレスをコピーし、外部ウォレットまたはプラットフォームから送金します。
common.helpWithdrawCryptoContent: 資産ページを開き、出金を選択し、出金アドレスと数量を入力して、セキュリティ認証を完了後に送信します。
common.helpDepositFiatContent: 法定通貨入金が利用可能な場合、入金ページに対応する支払い方法と処理要件が表示されます。
common.helpWithdrawFiatContent: 法定通貨出金が利用可能な場合、ページの案内に従って認証を完了し、出金詳細を確認してください。
common.helpSecurity2faTitle: 二要素認証を有効にする方法
common.helpSecurity2faContent: セキュリティセンターに移動し、案内に従って認証アプリまたは電話認証方法を紐付けます。
common.helpSecurityPasswordTitle: パスワード再設定方法
common.helpSecurityPasswordContent: ログインページで「パスワードを忘れた場合」をクリックし、メールまたは電話認証でパスワードを再設定します。
common.helpSecurityPhishingTitle: フィッシング攻撃を防ぐ方法
common.helpSecurityPhishingContent: 公式サイトにアクセスしていることを確認し、不審なリンクを避け、秘密鍵、パスワード、認証コードを共有しないでください。
common.helpSecurityAlertTitle: セキュリティ通知設定
common.helpSecurityAlertContent: セキュリティセンターでログイン、出金、その他重要操作の通知を管理し、異常な活動を素早く検知します。
common.helpApiCreateContent: API管理ページでキーを作成し、必要に応じて権限とIP許可リストを設定します。
common.helpApiDocsContent: APIドキュメントには、自動取引やシステム連携に利用できるエンドポイント、パラメータ、例が含まれます。
common.helpApiSecurityTitle: APIセキュリティのベストプラクティス
common.helpApiSecurityContent: API権限を制限し、IP許可リストを設定し、キーを定期的にローテーションし、クライアント側コードでキーを公開しないでください。
common.helpApiLimitContent: APIリクエスト頻度はアカウントレベルやエンドポイント種別により制限される場合があります。上限を超えるとリクエストが失敗することがあります。
common.helpPlatformRiskContent: デジタル資産取引にはリスクがあります。商品ルールを理解したうえで慎重に操作してください。
common.helpPlatformTermsContent: プラットフォームサービスを利用することは、プラットフォーム規約および関連ルールに従うことに同意したものとみなされます。
common.helpPlatformPrivacyTitle: プライバシーポリシー
common.helpPlatformPrivacyContent: プラットフォームはユーザーのプライバシーを重視し、プライバシーポリシーに従って個人情報を保護します。
common.helpPlatformComplianceTitle: コンプライアンスポリシー
common.helpPlatformComplianceContent: プラットフォームは適用法令に従い、コンプライアンスとリスク管理を継続的に改善します。
common.helpPlatformFeesContent: サービス手数料はページ表示および実際の執行記録に準じます。

members.name: John M. Probandt
members.bio:
John M. Probandt is an experienced chairman and board member with nearly 50 years of professional experience across the United States, Asia, the Middle East, and Africa, with a particular focus on banking, private equity, and venture capital.

He previously served as a senior executive at Morgan Stanley, Dean Witter Reynolds, and Kemper Securities. Since 2003, he has been the incumbent Chairman of an investment banking division of CITIC Group, a trillion-dollar Chinese state-owned conglomerate. He is also an Executive Director of Nev World and Goldenport Enterprises, holds positions in multiple investment vehicles.

Mr. Probandt is a published author and an accomplished public speaker, with expertise spanning investments, finance, and blockchain.

members.name: Professor Sverker Littorin
members.bio:
Professor Sverker Littorin is a senior Nordic strategic figure operating at the intersection of the Swedish Royal establishment,Sällskapet, national governance structures, and Nordic capital markets.

A recognized member of Sweden’s traditional elite system, he has held board and advisory roles within institutions closely associated with the Swedish Royal sphere, reflecting a high level of trust and institutional recognition.

His career spans public governance, listed-company board leadership, and international affairs, where he is known for shaping governance frameworks and long-term strategic direction.

members.name: Professor Negoslav P. Ostojic
members.bio:
Professor Negoslav P. Ostojić is the Executive Director of the European Center for Peace and Development (ECPD), an international institution operating within the framework of the United Nations University for Peace.

A senior scholar in international economics and development, he promotes global academic cooperation and dialogue on peace and human security.

He is a recipient of the Gusi Peace Prize and a member of several distinguished international academic institutions.

members.name: Dr. Brian C. T. Beckham
members.bio:
Dr. Brian C. T. Beckham is a seasoned expert in international affairs, public governance, and diplomatic coordination, with extensive experience across intergovernmental organizations and global institutions.

He currently serves as Special Representative to the United States for the European Center for Peace and Development (ECPD), a United Nations–mandated University for Peace within the UN academic system.

Throughout his career, Dr. Beckham has held senior positions within UN-recognized intergovernmental organizations, contributing to transatlantic dialogue, multilateral cooperation, and international policy coordination.

In recognition of his lifelong dedication to public service and international cooperation, he was awarded the President's Lifetime Achievement Award in 2018 and has received numerous international honors and chivalric distinctions.

members.name: Alfredo Jefferson
members.bio:
Alfredo Jefferson is a senior international development expert and policy advisor with decades of experience across the United Nations system and global public affairs.

He served for over twenty years with the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP), holding senior leadership and advisory roles at country, regional, and headquarters levels, including Deputy Resident Representative, Acting Resident Representative, Regional Coordinator, and Senior Advisor. Throughout his UN career, he provided strategic policy advice to governments, foreign ministries, and senior decision-makers across Africa, Latin America, the Caribbean, and the Asia-Pacific region. His work spanned development finance, resource mobilization, South-South cooperation, governance reform, and crisis response, overseeing and supporting large-scale international programs and multi-billion-dollar funding frameworks.

In recent years, Mr. Jefferson has continued to advise UN agencies and governments as an international development consultant, maintaining strong influence in diplomacy, public policy, and multilateral cooperation.

members.name: Professor Linjie Chou
members.bio:
Professor Zanadu is a Research Fellow at the European Center for Peace and Development (ECPD), where he lectures on global strategic affairs and directs Euro-Asia cooperation initiatives. He is also a Visiting Professor at the Federal University of Rio.

He is widely recognized for his independent, non-mainstream geopolitical analysis, offering deep insights into international diplomacy, great-power competition, and the hidden forces shaping global order. His current research focuses on race and ethnicity as core determinants of international relations.

members.name: Ali Rashid
members.bio:
Mr. Ali Rashid is a senior business and financial leader in the United Arab Emirates.

He serves as Vice Chairman of Mashreq Bank, one of the UAE’s leading commercial banks, and is a Board Member of Dubai World, the government-owned global investment holding group.

He previously served as Chairman of Nakheel PJSC, overseeing landmark real estate developments including the Palm Islands.

Mr. Rashid holds a degree in Civil Engineering from Clarkson University (USA).

members.name: Yazeed Mohamed Al-Rajhi
members.bio:
Yazeed Mohamed Al-Rajhi is a leading Saudi business and financial figure and a member of the founding family of Al Rajhi Bank, the Kingdom’s largest Islamic bank.

As a Board and Governance Committee member, he plays a key role in long-term financial strategy and institutional governance.

He also leads diversified investments through Rajhi Invest, spanning banking, industry, tourism, real estate, and global assets, and has been directly involved in multi-billion-dollar national strategic transactions alongside Saudi Arabia’s Public Investment Fund (PIF).

members.name: George Jensen
members.bio:
George Jensen is a veteran American entrepreneur and private equity partner with more than 30 years of leadership experience across technology and capital markets.

He is a Partner at Black Eagle Partners and a Co-Founder and former CEO of USA Technologies (NASDAQ: USAT), which he led from inception to public listing.

Widely recognized for building and scaling public companies, Jensen is known for his ability to bridge innovation, finance, and long-term value creation.

members.name: Shelly Kraft
members.bio:
Shelly Kraft is a veteran Wall Street financial expert with over 30 years of experience in investment banking, securities markets, and financial media.

He is the Founder, Chairman, and CEO of SNN Incorporated (StockNewsNow), a leading platform for micro-cap market intelligence and public-company investor communication.

Kraft is widely recognized as a key bridge between U.S. public companies and the global investment community.

members.name: Tim Crown
members.bio:
Tim Crown is a prominent American technology entrepreneur and capital markets leader, best known as the co-founder and former Chairman of Insight Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: NSIT). He played a central role in building the company from an early-stage venture into a global, publicly listed IT solutions and services provider with multi-billion-dollar annual revenues.

Under his strategic leadership, Insight Enterprises expanded across more than twenty countries, delivering enterprise-grade IT infrastructure, cloud, software, and digital transformation solutions to organizations worldwide.

Crown is widely recognized for his ability to scale technology businesses, align innovation with commercial execution, and navigate complex capital markets. Beyond his public-company experience, he is an active technology investor and advisor, focusing on transformative business models at the intersection of technology, and long-term value creation.

members.name: Ron Suber
members.bio:
Ron Suber is a globally recognized leader in financial technology and a pioneer of the U.S. peer-to-peer lending industry. He served as President of Prosper, where he led the platform’s transformation into a regulated, institutionally backed fintech leader, helping bring P2P lending into the mainstream financial system.

With over 20 years of experience across banking, consumer finance, and fintech, Ron Suber is widely respected for advancing financial innovation within regulatory frameworks. He is also a key driving force behind LendIt, the world’s largest fintech and online lending conference series.

members.name: Dr. David Sans
members.bio:
Dr. David Sans is President and Senior Partner of D.Boral / EF Hutton Healthcare, overseeing healthcare-related transactions and capital markets initiatives.

On January 17, 2025, he led the successful issuance of the $TRUMP token, generating significant global attention. He previously worked at Pfizer on the commercialization of Rebif® and Macugen®, and served as a Senior Medical Scientist at Novartis, contributing to the launch of Glivec® (Imatinib).

His career also includes executive roles at ImClone Systems and Mount Sinai Health System, where he advanced strategic partnerships with Philips, LabCorp, and Agilent.

members.name: Oleg Viktorovich Zhokhov
members.bio:
Oleg Viktorovich Zhokhov is an international entrepreneur operating at the intersection of urban infrastructure, heavy-asset industries, and crypto-financial innovation.

With an engineering background rooted in the former Soviet industrial system, he has led large-scale municipal solid waste, landfill, and recycling operations, building strong execution and commercial expertise in highly regulated, capital intensive environments.

He is the driving force behind ASGARD, a decentralized environmental governance platform that applies blockchain and crypto-economic mechanisms to global environmental and infrastructure challenges. By connecting real-world assets, long-term project cash flows, and decentralized finance, Zhokhov has positioned ASGARD as a credible bridge between traditional industry and the emerging crypto economy.
